protocol.supersedes_aborted_pilot: final_j0_action_pretrain_s17_64e_20260722 stopped after epoch 11 when completed wave-10 attribution favored procedural context
protocol.supersedes_aborted_adaptation: final_j1p_procedure_staged_crops_s17_16e_20260722 stopped after epoch 8 with zero validation mistake recall; held-out test was not reached
protocol.test_policy: evaluate the held-out test exactly once after both stages and validation-only model selection complete

architecture.reason: staging plus crops replicated across seeds; under fixed staged training, procedural context raised exact event F1 and sharply reduced matched delay, while factorization regressed the balance

stages.selection_constraint: strict incorrect-event recall > 0, normality AP >= validation prevalence, false alerts <= 2/min
